---
title: "Styles"
---

```{r}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

To help get your create juices flowing, this vignette shows a banana rendered in a variety of styles. You can find the complete source in [`styles.yml`](https://github.com/hadley/bananarama/blob/main/vignettes/articles/styles.yml).

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
library(bananarama)
paths <- bananarama("styles.yml")

library(magick)
files <- list.files("vignettes/articles/styles", full.names = TRUE)
for (file in files) {
  img <- image_read(file)
  img <- image_resize(img, "300x")
  image_write(img, file)
  cat("Resized", file, "\n")
}
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
config <- yaml12::read_yaml("styles.yml")
for (image in config$images) {
  path <- file.path("styles", paste0(image$name, ".png"))
  if (!file.exists(path)) {
    next
  }

  cat("## ", image$name, "\n\n", sep = "")
  cat("*", trimws(image$style), "*\n\n", sep = "")
  cat("![](", path, ")\n\n", sep = "")
}
```
